The text is more about the negative consequences (illness, death following spouse's death, caring for a spouse with mental disorder) rather than the general responsibility. So C might not be correct. Option D is "the consequence of a broken marriage." The text is talking about what happens when a spouse dies, not necessarily a broken marriage.
